name: redline
voice: night-circuit racing telemetry — captions move at speed. Body words DRIFT IN along a low track line with velocity streaks and two trailing echo copies that burn off; emphasis words gear-shift snap and sweep a tachometer arc into the redline. The apex arrives like a car at speed: a speck at a vanishing point that accelerates into a full italic slab across the frame, locks with a contact squash, paint cools from white-hot to bone, a heat-ripple trail shimmers behind it, then it whips off frame with a smear.
when: high-energy, motion-forward, performance/automotive/sports/tech-velocity clips — anything that should feel fast and kinetic. Loud register. Needs a scene that tolerates a charge-dim (any luma) and an apex word that can cross the subject silhouette.
